form.formComment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Produced a good effort last start to finish fourth in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 2 over 400m at Warragul behind Warrior Page, beaten 1.75 lengths (23.21). Will find this a little easier. Has claims if at his best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Produced a good effort last start to finish fourth in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 2 over 400m at Warragul behind Warrior Page, beaten 1.75 lengths (23.21). Will find this a little easier. Has claims if at his best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stumbled soon after start and lost ground.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when second (22.32) over 390m at Shepparton. Aided by a low draw and is among the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when second (22.32) over 390m at Shepparton. Aided by a low draw and is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.46) at Geelong in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Has two successes and four minors from 11 starts from box 3. Others rate better this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (23.46) at Geelong in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Has two successes and four minors from 11 starts from box 3. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 390m at Warrnambool. Better off looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 390m at Warrnambool. Better off looking to others.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 3.5 lengths fifth (17.20) over 300m at this track. Should be around the mark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 3.5 lengths fifth (17.20) over 300m at this track. Should be around the mark.

form.formComment: Solid performance to post a big 3.5 lengths win at Sale over 435m (24.69) beating Soda Turkey in Grade 5 on April 1. Can win again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to post a big 3.5 lengths win at Sale over 435m (24.69) beating Soda Turkey in Grade 5 on April 1. Can win again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on first turn and tailed off.
Quick to begin; Checked and raced wide turning off back straight, lost ground.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (19.84) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5, finishing a 5.5 lengths fifth. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and four places from 10 starts. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Miss Money at Sale last start over 435m (24.92). Right in the mix.
